body.title: inner_cc revamp — model-flexible, multi-turn, prompt caching
body.result: D269: _make_or_request() unified OR helper with Anthropic prompt caching (cache_control ephemeral + anthropic-beta header for anthropic/* models). call_inner_cc_long() multi-turn loop (12 turns default). long_running=False param on call_inner_cc() delegates to long path. _HAIKU_MODEL/_SONNET_MODEL env-var constants. _log_error() forensic logger. 4 tests, 564 total passing.
body.description: Revise inner_cc.py: model-selectable (haiku/sonnet via OR, not just gpt-4o-mini), add long_running path using OpenRouterReasoner for multi-turn agentic loop, add Anthropic prompt caching headers (cache_control ephemeral + anthropic-beta header) when model is anthropic/*. Reclaims the inner-Claude concept for training and other focused-agent tasks.
